title: Under legislative parliamentary procedure, a member may use the “condition of the file” before adjournment of the Session to make a statement about business they believe still requ
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Senate Bill 405 would have allowed communities throughout California to authorize voter ID requirements for their local elections.
A survey by the Berkeley Institute of Government Studies found that a vast majority of Californians support requiring a government ID to vote.
As of 2024, 46.2% of California voters are registered as Democrats, while 24.7% are registered Republicans.
Each Republican Senator in California represents approximately 1 million constituents.
Numerous committees in the California State Senate only have one member from the minority party.
California is represented by a Democratic supermajority, which stifles representation for Republicans.
